overlay_pattern.summary: The creator effectively employs picture-in-picture videos and images across their reels, primarily utilizing them in the middle sections to enhance visual engagement with the spoken content. The overlays are often animated, lending a dynamic quality to the presentation.

used in the middle section when 'Walnut's' is mentioned, and also appears in the middle of another reel during 'users funding'
